title: Kidplokio Camo Rescue Mission Toy Blaster with Lights Sounds Boys Ages 3 and Up
description:
Featuring colorful, flashing lights and awesome blaster sound effects, the Kidplokio Camo Rescue Mission Toy Blaster will have little ones engaged in hours of active pretend play! Made from durable plastic, the toy is lightweight, easy to use, comes with a shoulder strap, and installed batteries, and is ready to go right out of the box. The fun begins with the fast-action trigger; upon release, the toy sets off an awesome display of colorful, flashing lights in conjunction with wild blasting firing sounds, making little heroes' rescue missions even more fun and realistic! The toy comes WITH batteries installed, so battle action can start right out of the box! No tools or complicated assembly is required

Kidplokio Camo Rescue Mission Toy Blaster with Lights Sounds Boys Ages 3 and Up

Featuring colorful, flashing lights and awesome blaster sound effects, the Kidplokio Camo Rescue Mission Toy Blaster will have little ones engaged in hours of active pretend play! Made from durable plastic, the toy is lightweight, easy to use, comes with a shoulder strap, and installed batteries, and is ready to go right out of the box.

Key Features

  • PRETEND PLAY TOY: Featuring a cool camo design, lightweight with included shoulder strap, awesome sound effects, and vibrant flashing lights, kids will have a blast playing with this exhilarating toy gun, whether it be team rescue missions, secret agent undertakings or outdoor one versus one battle!
  • LIGHTS AND SOUND EFFECTS: Spectacular sound effects and fun flashing lights make pretend play even more fun and realistic for kids and toddlers! This toy comes with batteries installed, so the fun can begin right out of the box; no tools or complicated assembly is required
  • COOL CAMO DESIGN: Stealthy and covert, especially for outside games, this light-up toy Blasterfeatures a lightweight design with cool camouflage coloring and details, sure to spark any little warrior’s imagination for adventurous playtime sessions
  • ACTIVE KIDS TOYS: Get kids moving and off cell phones or other devices with this exciting camo toy blaster! Physical activity and imaginative pretend play will greatly benefit kids' overall mental health, as well as their overall cognitive and social development
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13 x 7 x 1.5 inches; Weight: 0.5lbs; Color: Camouflage; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPLRESCGN1
  • UPC: 810058486851
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 13 in x 7 in x 1.5 in

The fun begins with the fast-action trigger; upon release, the toy sets off an awesome display of colorful, flashing lights in conjunction with wild blasting firing sounds, making little heroes' rescue missions even more fun and realistic! The toy comes WITH batteries installed, so battle action can start right out of the box! No tools or complicated assembly is required.

A great toy to get your kids off the couch and reduce screen time away from cell phones or other devices, the pretend play toy is action-packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features, that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next neighborhood battle. Whether it’s a team rescue mission or secret agent undertaking, kids will have a blast indoors or out with this exciting Kidplokio Camouflage Toy Blaster. Made from durable plastic construction, the camo toy blaster can stand up to hours of play and lots of wear and tear.

Suitable for kids aged three and up.
